_comment_remote: GoalOps MCP — Claude Desktop config.
Two options below; pick ONE block under mcpServers and delete the other.
goalops          — uses `mcp-remote` (npm) to bridge stdio<->HTTP. Most
compatible across Claude Desktop versions. Requires
Node 20+ on the user's machine (npx pulls mcp-remote
on first run). The first run prints a localhost URL to
finish OAuth if the server speaks OAuth; we don't, so
it falls straight through to basic_auth.
goalops-native   — direct HTTP transport supported by recent Claude
Desktop. No Node required, but only works on builds
that ship the `streamable-http` client. If you see
'unknown transport' in logs, use the mcp-remote one.
Replace REPLACE_ME_BASE64 with `base64(username:password)` for the team
credentials your admin set in Caddyfile. On Windows PowerShell:
[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('goalops:THE_PASSWORD'))
On macOS / Linux:
printf 'goalops:THE_PASSWORD' | base64
Config file location:
Windows : %APPDATA%\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json
macOS   : ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json
After saving, fully quit Claude Desktop (system tray -> Quit) and reopen.
